maps.title: MAP: To returns to the Reserve
maps.objective: To ensure to submit certain supervisory returns to the reserve bank as per various directions / circulars/ notifications issued by the bank from time to time

tasks.title: Assess current state against: To returns to the Reserve
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'To returns to the Reserve'. Document the existing Reporting posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: All Supervised Entities (SEs) are required to submit certain
supervisory returns to the Reserve Bank as per various directions / circulars/
notifications issued by the Bank from time to time.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: To returns to the Reserve
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'To returns to the Reserve'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: To returns to the Reserve
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'To returns to the Reserve'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: To returns to the Reserve
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'To returns to the Reserve'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: To returns to the Reserve
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'To returns to the Reserve'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
